title: Reddit AMA (ask me anything) about getting started on a CRM

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Community,

Interested in learning the best way to start a CRM. monday.com CRM expert, Ron Kimhi, is here to answer your questions!

Start asking all your burning CRM questions now and Ron will answer live on Wednesday, July 16th at 9 A.M. EST.

Get started with a CRM - AMA 11620×1620 245 KB
